strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling experience at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective and consistent innovation in open-source projects
concerns: Limited explicit cloud or AI expertise in leadership roles; current AI work appears tactical rather than strategic
Most recent roles focus on full-stack development rather than AI/cloud specialization
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and entrepreneurial spirit but lacks clear evidence of deep AI/cloud strategy experience or advanced AI-related education. His recent AI-agent work is promising but not yet at the strategic level required for a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy. The mismatch between his broad technical versatility and the specific needs of AI/cloud leadership is concerning.
